title: Spontex Heavy Duty Scourer Pads 3 Pack
features: Anti-grease system so stays cleaner for longer
Ideal for burnt on food and grease
description: Experience powerful cleaning with our Heavy Duty Scourer Pads, designed to tackle burnt-on food and grease with ease. These durable pads feature special fibres that make them ultra-efficient and resistant, perfect for tough jobs around the kitchen and beyond. Measuring 10 x 15 cm, they are ideal for scrubbing various surfaces, including ceramic, porcelain, stainless steel, and melamine. For best results, use with your favourite washing up liquid, cream cleaner, or cleaning paste. Machine washable at up to 40°C. Test on an inconspicuous area before use and avoid non-stick pans or delicate surfaces. Each pack contains 3 pads, ensuring you're well-stocked for your cleaning needs.
